value.text:
=MindOps 
 Your Clarity Companion 🧠💡  Hi {{ $('Strict Entry (Contract)').item.json.first_name }}. I'm your assistant for thinking out loud. I'm here to help you clear the noise from your head so nothing important gets lost.  Sometimes, simply saying things out loud helps us see the way forward. Use me as your 'mental draft pad': 🗣️ Offload what's on your mind: Send a quick audio or text about whatever's pending or draining your energy. 📊 I'll organize it for you: I'll identify what matters most and suggest one small physical step to get started. ☁️ No pressure: We're not chasing perfection — just a little momentum.  To get started right now: 
1️⃣ Create your account at: https://mindops-web-43822856294.us-central1.run.app
2️⃣ Log in and copy your code. 
3️⃣ Send it here: /vinculate [code]

=Hey {{ $('Strict Entry (Contract)').item.json.first_name }} , your system is fully active.
Just send me a voice note or text about whatever's on your mind — I'll help you organize it and find the next small step.
What's taking up space in your head right now?
❌ Invalid or expired code. Please generate a new one on the web and try again: /vinculate [new code]
⚠️ System Sync Error  I’m unable to process your request right now due to a communication glitch with the Core. Please re-attempt the action or check your connection.

MindOps 
 Setup Incomplete ⚠️  I noticed your Voice Protocol is not active yet.   Without your contact number, the system won't be able to call you and help you break out of a loop if you get stuck (🔴 High Friction).  Please tap the button below to share your contact and fully activate your safety net.

Voice Protocol Activated! 🛡️📞  Your analog safety net is fully operational. From now on, MindOps will watch over your momentum.  No debts, no guilt. What's on your mind right now? Let it all out (audio or text).
⚠️ System Sync Error  I’m unable to process your request right now due to a communication glitch with the Core. Please re-attempt the action or check your connection.

✅ Linking Successful! Your web account and Telegram are now synced.  Final step: To activate your Voice Protocol, please share your contact.  Sometimes we all get stuck. If my telemetry detects that you've entered a state of High Friction (🔴) and you've been silent for hours, I will call your phone to help you break the paralysis and recover your flow.
